zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Elall於大約1314年出生在英國藍卡爾奧維 維雷斯達爾時，她的父親Jordan Elall Forester of Wyresdale30歲，母親Alice de Thweng23歲。她於大約1329年與William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1372年在英國肯特坎特布瑞享年59歲，埋葬在英國肯特坎特布瑞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Elall于大约1314年出生在英国藍卡爾奧維 維雷斯達爾时，她的父亲Jordan Elall Forester of Wyresdale30岁，母亲Alice de Thweng23岁。她于大约1329年与William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1372年在英国肯特坎特布瑞享年59岁，埋葬在英国肯特坎特布瑞。

nameMeanings.name: Elall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Mohan, Onkar, Raj, Sanjay, Satish, Amrit, Deo, Drupatie, Indra, Mahendra, Pooran, Rajendra.

variants.name: Lal
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Sohan, Madan, Mohan, Tarsem, Ram, Manohar, Anil, Brij, Jagdish, Krishan, Moti.

Indian (northern states): from a personal name meaning ‘darling’, from Sanskrit lāla ‘cajoling’ (related to Sanskrit lālana ‘caressing’). In several modern Indian languages lāl is a term of endearment for a child; it is also an epithet of the god Krishna. There is also a homonymous word lāl in Hindi, from Persian, meaning ‘ruby, red’, which may have contributed to the popularity of this name. It occurs commonly as the final element of a compound personal name, as in Brajlal (Braj being the name of the place where the god Krishna is supposed to have lived as a child) and Motilal (Hindi motī ‘pearl’).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Elall was born about 1314, in Over Wyresdale, Lancashire, England, her father, Jordan Elall Forester of Wyresdale, was 30 and her mother, Alice de Thweng, was 23. She married William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton about 1329, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1372, in Canterbury, Kent, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Canterbury, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Elall est née environ 1314, à Over Wyresdale, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Jordan Elall Forester of Wyresdale, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Alice de Thweng, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton environ 1329, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1372, à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Elall um 1314 in Over Wyresdale, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jordan Elall Forester of Wyresdale 30 und ihre Mutter Alice de Thweng 23. Sie hat um 1329 in Lancashire, England William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1372 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Canterbury, Kent, England und wurde in Canterbury, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Elall è nata il circa 1314 nel Over Wyresdale, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Jordan Elall Forester of Wyresdale, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Alice de Thweng, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton circa 1329, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1372, nel Canterbury, Kent, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Canterbury, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Elallが約1314年にイギリスランカシュアイアオバー ウイレスダルで生まれた時，父Jordan Elall Forester of Wyresdaleは30歳，母Alice de Thwengは23歳であった。約1329年にイギリスランカシュアイアでWilliam Molyneux I, Lord Of Seftonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1372年にイギリスケントカンテルブリーで59歳で死去し，イギリスケントカンテルブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Elall(이)가 대략 1314년 영국 랭카실르 버 윈이레즈데일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jordan Elall Forester of Wyresdale(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Thweng(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1329년 영국 랭카실르에서 William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1372년 영국 켄트 캉르버이에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 캉르버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Elall nasceu aproximadamente 1314, em Over Wyresdale, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Jordan Elall Forester of Wyresdale, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Thweng, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton aproximadamente 1329, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1372, em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Elall родилась около 1314 г. в местности овир виресдеил, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Jordan Elall Forester of Wyresdale было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Thweng, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton около 1329 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1372 г. в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Elall nació aproximadamente 1314, en Over Wyresdale, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Jordan Elall Forester of Wyresdale, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Alice de Thweng, tenía 23 años. Se casó con William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton aproximadamente 1329, en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1372, en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra.
